title: Seems Like Yesterday
description: Exploring personal growth and social commentary.
lyrics:
Seems like yesterday we used to care It seems like yesterday we used to not stare
Seems like yesterday we used to care If our other person was going down before
us But now we're just trippin' every motherfuck
around Hoping they fall before we fall
Ain't trying to help no one at all Seems like yesterday man we all could ball
Now we're just individualized inside our own pancake of life
And making the shapes that we see If we don't agree with anyone, fuck them
I don't even care You should come around and hug your fam
You should come around and be there I swear if you do that you'll find energy
It's called happiness in the great beyond It seems like yesterday all we had was really
small troubles Yesterday it all seemed small, yeah
It seems like yesterday I could dream higher, feel brighter
Now you're saying nah, nah, nah It's better now for you there from the storm
Fifteen years in the game Can't give me nothing recognition
All I'm feeling from you is shame I'm sorry you would hate yourself in that
name, that frame It seems like yesterday you were telling
me you'll love me forever And then your name would never be the same
You wanna take it back, you can't do that You wanna tell me I'm not a part of you
Well fucking screw that, you hear me You hear it from the beginning
He's mine from the end of the mental thoughts We're just beginning again
And you wanna look back to yesterday as it's not your friend
Reframe your life, you hear me Reframe the thing you want from you
It's not scary, it seems like yesterday We cared about what you had to say
Being creative in our own way Seems like yesterday I was okay with me
I was okay
Now the dark hit you right in the heart And you're sorry you didn't do this mistake
For the regret from your heart You should have been there from the start
Instead you ink me in over glass beyond I can't see you my friend when you're so
fucking mean It seems like yesterday you wanted my dream
You wanted me on your team It seems like yesterday it was all a dream
Now I'm sitting there looking at Nelly Tim McGraw saying man, Im kinda funny
Lost my life, my dream Everything yesterday it seemed so complete
Now I seem like it's just crumbled in the ocean of time
And you're still on my mind
All the trips and all the fiends and the scenes Bring me closer to reality
It seems like yesterday I wasn't just a name in your book
A reality, a fatality to write the hook
Bitch I told you I was still here until you told me I wasn't
Oh no, oh no
